---
title: "Multi-omics architecture of childhood obesity and metabolic dysfunction uncovers biological pathways and prenatal determinants"
date: 2025-01-01
author:
  - name: Lorenzo Fabbri
    orcid: 0000-0003-3031-322X
    affiliation: ISGlobal, Universitat Pompeu Fabra
categories:
  - Multi-omics
  - Exposome
  - Metabolic Health
  - Child Health
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    Stratakis N, Anguita-Ruiz A, <strong>Fabbri L</strong>, Maitre L, Gonz&aacute;lez JR, Andrusaityte S, Basaga&ntilde;a X, Borr&agrave;s E, Keun HC, Chatzi L, et al. "Multi-omics architecture of childhood obesity and metabolic dysfunction uncovers biological pathways and prenatal determinants." <em>Nature Communications</em> 16 (2025), doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-025-56013-7"><code>10.1038/s41467-025-56013-7</code></a>
  links:
    - name: Final version
      url: https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-025-56013-7
      icon: fa-solid fa-scroll
    - name: Add to Zotero
      url: https://www.zotero.org/save?type=doi&q=10.1038/s41467-025-56013-7
      icon: ai ai-zotero
doi: 10.1038/s41467-025-56013-7
---

## Abstract

Available at the [journal website](https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-025-56013-7).

## Important links

- [Published version](https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-025-56013-7)

## BibTeX citation

```bibtex
@article{stratakis2025multi,
  title={Multi-omics architecture of childhood obesity and metabolic dysfunction uncovers biological pathways and prenatal determinants},
  author={Stratakis, Nikos and Anguita-Ruiz, Augusto and Fabbri, Lorenzo and Maitre, L{\'e}a and Gonz{\'a}lez, Juan R. and Andrusaityte, Sandra and Basaga{\~n}a, Xavier and Borr{\`a}s, Eva and Keun, Hector C. and Chatzi, Lida and others},
  journal={Nature Communications},
  volume={16},
  year={2025},
  publisher={Springer Science and Business Media LLC}
}
```
